detail.description: Joshua Kuroda-Grauer reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Nasim Nuñez.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer hits a ground-rule double (6) on a line drive down the left-field line.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Dylan Crews.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a fly ball to right fielder Griffin Conine. Lawrence Butler to 2nd.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer flies out to center fielder Esteury Ruiz.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a line drive to right fielder Griffin Conine. Henry Bolte to 3rd.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 1st.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a line drive to left fielder Griffin Conine.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds out, second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a line drive to left fielder Heriberto Hernández.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds into a force out, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Lawrence Butler out at 2nd.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer flies out to center fielder Andy Pages.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer pops out to shortstop Miguel Rojas.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Jonah Heim to 3rd.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer flies out to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds out, shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer lines out to right fielder Kyle Tucker.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages. Alika Williams to 2nd.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds out, third baseman Max Muncy to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Max Muncy scores. Alika Williams to 3rd.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer pops out to second baseman Chase Meidroth.
Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 1st.

Joshua Kuroda-Grauer singles on a ground ball to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Lawrence Butler to 3rd.
